TestCase z9Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_values = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_values, t1.values, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.values = follow_case_values;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n == 0
    if (follow_case.n > 0) {
        for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n / 2; ++i) {
            int temp = follow_case.values[i];
            follow_case.values[i] = follow_case.values[follow_case.n - 1 - i];
            follow_case.values[follow_case.n - 1 - i] = temp;
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
